title: Resume DOMMatrix SSR Fix Audit
summary: Fixes /resume SSR/runtime failure by moving react-pdf behind a client-only dynamic boundary so pdfjs-dist is not evaluated in the server bundle.
changed: Changed src/components/content/ResumePdfViewer.tsx into a next/dynamic ssr:false wrapper.
Added src/test/resume-server-render.test.tsx as a focused SSR isolation guard.
Updated tests/resume.spec.ts and tests/public-resume-empty-state.spec.ts to assert HTTP 200 on /resume.

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/public-resume-empty-state.spec.ts tests/resume.spec.ts --workers=1
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs frontend | rg "DOMMatrix|ReferenceError"

risks: Vitest covers wrapper isolation rather than reproducing the entire Next server bundle path.
Client-side react-pdf behavior is unchanged beyond SSR isolation.
recommendation: Proceed with this focused /resume fix and handle full-suite Playwright isolation separately.
